description_long: This is a robust, stainless steel wristwatch with a classic diver-style design, featuring a black rotating bezel with white minute markers and a matching black dial. The dial is adorned with luminous hour markers and hands, as well as a date window at the 3 o'clock position, enhancing legibility in low-light conditions. The watch case is thick and solid, with a prominent crown guard on the right side for added protection. The strap is a metal link bracelet, secured with a sturdy clasp, and the overall construction suggests durability and water resistance. The watch face is protected by a clear, likely scratch-resistant crystal, and the back of the case is smooth and unadorned. The design is both functional and stylish, suitable for everyday urban wear or more formal occasions.
description: A stainless steel diver-style wristwatch with a black bezel, luminous markers, and a metal link bracelet. The design is robust, functional, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black dial, luminous markers, rotating bezel, and date window.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, crown guard, and profile of the metal bracelet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned case back and the full width of the metal bracelet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile and bracelet curvature, with less detail on the crown.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized logo and text are present on the upper center of the dial, featuring a crown symbol and brand name in white.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with luminous dot and baton hour markers, a date window at 3 o'clock, and bold white hands. The design is classic diver style, with a clean, functional layout and a rotating bezel with minute markers.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of stainless steel, featuring solid links and a robust construction.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second), luminous markers, and a date window. The display is clear and functional, with high legibility.
attribute_clasp_style: Fold-over clasp with safety, typical of metal link bracelets.
